description_long: This object is a sleek, metallic shotgun with a long, vented barrel and a dark, glossy pistol grip. The barrel features multiple elongated cutouts along the top, likely for weight reduction and heat dissipation. The cylinder and frame are robust, with a smooth, polished finish that reflects light. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionate, enclosing a single trigger. The grip is ergonomically shaped, appearing to be made of a high-gloss synthetic or lacquered wood material. The overall design is modern and streamlined, with a focus on both functionality and aesthetics.
description: A modern, metallic shotgun with a long, vented barrel and a glossy black pistol grip. The design is sleek and polished, featuring a rounded trigger guard and ergonomic handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, vented barrel, and glossy black grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and vented top, with minimal grip visibility.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel vents, cylinder, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the grip and trigger guard, with the barrel receding into the background.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with elongated venting along the top of the barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
